edges: API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : check quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : quota exhausted (reply)
API Gateway -> Client : rejection (too many requests) (reply)
Client -> API Gateway : requests data (attempt 2 - retry) (message)
API Gateway -> Rate Limiter : check quota (message)
Rate Limiter -> API Gateway : quota available (reply)
API Gateway -> Backend Service : forward request (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "Client Data Request Workflow") {
    val client = lifeline(name = "Client") { isActor = true }
    val apiGateway = lifeline(name = "API Gateway")
    val rateLimiter = lifeline(name = "Rate Limiter")
    val backendService = lifeline(name = "Backend Service")

    // First attempt: Quota exhausted
    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "requests data (attempt 1)")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "check quota")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = apiGateway, label = "quota exhausted")
    reply(from = apiGateway, to = client, label = "rejection (too many requests)")

    // Client retries after backoff (represented as a new sequence of messages)
    message(from = client, to = apiGateway, label = "requests data (attempt 2 - retry)")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = rateLimiter, label = "check quota")
    reply(from = rateLimiter, to = apiGateway, label = "quota available")
    message(from = apiGateway, to = backendService, label = "forward request")
    reply(from = backendService, to = apiGateway, label = "data")
    reply(from = apiGateway, to = client, label = "data")
}

@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as APIGateway
participant "Rate Limiter" as RateLimiter
participant "Backend Service" as BackendService

loop Retries up to 3 times
    Client -> APIGateway : requestData()
    APIGateway -> RateLimiter : checkQuota(clientId)
    alt Quota Available
        RateLimiter --> APIGateway : quotaAvailable(true)
        APIGateway -> BackendService : getData(requestId)
        BackendService --> APIGateway : data
        APIGateway --> Client : data
        break Successful retrieval, exit loop
    else Quota Exhausted
        RateLimiter --> APIGateway : quotaAvailable(false)
        APIGateway --> Client : rejectTooManyRequests()
        Client -> Client : waitBackoffPeriod()
    end
end
@enduml

  participant Backend Service

  loop Client retries on rejection (up to 3 times)
    Client->>API Gateway: requestData()
    API Gateway->>Rate Limiter: checkQuota(clientId)

    alt Quota Available

      Backend Service-->>API Gateway: data

    else Quota Exhausted

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant Web Portal
  participant Authentication Service
  participant User Database
  participant Email Service

  User->>Web Portal: Request password reset (email)
  Web Portal->>Authentication Service: Reset password (email)

  alt User exists
    Authentication Service->>User Database: Lookup email
    User Database-->>Authentication Service: User found
    Authentication Service->>Authentication Service: Generate reset token
    Authentication Service->>User Database: Store token
    User Database-->>Authentication Service: Token stored
    Authentication Service->>Email Service: Trigger send reset email
  else User unknown
    Authentication Service->>User Database: Lookup email
    User Database-->>Authentication Service: User not found
  end

  Authentication Service-->>Web Portal: Password reset initiated (neutral message)
  Web Portal-->>User: Notification (neutral message)

@startuml
actor User
participant "Web Portal"
participant "Authentication Service"
participant "User Database"
participant "Email Service"

User -> "Web Portal" : requests password reset
"Web Portal" -> "Authentication Service" : resetPassword(email)
"Authentication Service" -> "User Database" : lookupUser(email)

alt User exists
    "User Database" --> "Authentication Service" : user details found
    "Authentication Service" -> "User Database" : storeResetToken(token)
    "User Database" --> "Authentication Service" : token stored
    "Authentication Service" ->> "Email Service" : sendResetEmail(email, token_link)
    "Authentication Service" --> "Web Portal" : neutral confirmation
else User unknown
    "User Database" --> "Authentication Service" : user not found
    "Authentication Service" --> "Web Portal" : neutral confirmation
end

"Web Portal" --> User : neutral notification
@enduml

@startuml
actor Client
participant APIGateway as "API Gateway"
participant TokenCache as "Token Cache"
participant AuthService as "Authentication Service"
participant OrderService as "Order Service"

Client -> APIGateway : Call order endpoint (JWT)

APIGateway -> TokenCache : Check token status

alt Token not in cache
    TokenCache --> APIGateway : No entry
    APIGateway -> AuthService : Verify JWT
    AuthService --> APIGateway : Token valid / invalid

    APIGateway -> TokenCache : Store validation result
    TokenCache --> APIGateway : Result stored
else Token found in cache
    TokenCache --> APIGateway : Token valid / invalid
end

alt Token is valid
    APIGateway -> OrderService : Forward request
    OrderService --> APIGateway : Order list
    APIGateway --> Client : Order list
else Token is invalid
    APIGateway --> Client : Access denied (401 Unauthorized)
end
@enduml

edges: Authentication Service -> User Database : storeResetToken(userId, token) (message)

    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }

@startuml
actor Customer
participant OrderService
participant SagaOrchestrator
participant EventLog
participant WarehouseService
participant PaymentService
participant ShipmentService

Customer -> OrderService : placeOrder()
activate OrderService

OrderService -> SagaOrchestrator : instantiateSaga()
activate SagaOrchestrator
SagaOrchestrator --> OrderService : sagaInstanceCreated
OrderService --> Customer : orderReceived (pending)

SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(SagaStarted)
EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : reserveItems()
activate WarehouseService
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(ItemsReservationRequested)
EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

alt items available
    WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsReserved
    deactivate WarehouseService
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(ItemsReserved)
    EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

    SagaOrchestrator -> PaymentService : processPayment()
    activate PaymentService
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(PaymentRequested)
    EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

    alt payment successful
        PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentSuccessful
        deactivate PaymentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(PaymentSuccessful)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

        SagaOrchestrator -> ShipmentService : commissionShipment()
        activate ShipmentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(ShipmentRequested)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
        ShipmentService --> SagaOrchestrator : shipmentCommissioned
        deactivate ShipmentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(ShipmentCommissioned)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

        SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : orderCompleted()
        OrderService --> Customer : orderConfirmation()
        deactivate OrderService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(SagaCompleted_Success)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

    else payment failed
        PaymentService --> SagaOrchestrator : paymentFailed
        deactivate PaymentService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(PaymentFailed)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

        SagaOrchestrator -> WarehouseService : cancelReservation()
        activate WarehouseService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(CancellingReservation)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
        WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : reservationCancelled
        deactivate WarehouseService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(ReservationCancelled)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

        SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : orderFailed(paymentFailed)
        OrderService --> Customer : orderFailureNotification()
        deactivate OrderService
        SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(SagaCompleted_PaymentFailed)
        EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
    end alt

else items not available
    WarehouseService --> SagaOrchestrator : itemsNotAvailable
    deactivate WarehouseService
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(ItemsNotAvailable)
    EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged

    SagaOrchestrator -> OrderService : orderFailed(itemsNotAvailable)
    OrderService --> Customer : orderFailureNotification()
    deactivate OrderService
    SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : log(SagaCompleted_ItemsNotAvailable)
    EventLog --> SagaOrchestrator : logged
end alt

SagaOrchestrator -> SagaOrchestrator : teardown()
deactivate SagaOrchestrator

@enduml

edges: SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : Log Item Reservation Attempt (message)
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : Log Shipment Commission Attempt (message)
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : Log Reservation Cancellation Attempt (message)
SagaOrchestrator -> EventLog : Log Items Not Available (Aborting) (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram
  actor Customer
  participant OrderService as Order Service
  participant SagaOrchestrator as Saga Orchestrator
  participant EventLog as Event Log
  participant WarehouseService as Warehouse Service
  participant PaymentService as Payment Service
  participant ShipmentService as Shipment Service

  Customer->>OrderService: Place Order
  OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: Instantiate Saga
  SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Saga Started

  SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: Reserve Items
  SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Item Reservation Attempt

  alt Items Available
    WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: Items Reserved
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Items Reserved

    SagaOrchestrator->>PaymentService: Process Payment
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Payment Attempt

    alt Payment Success
      PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: Payment Success
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Payment Success

      SagaOrchestrator->>ShipmentService: Commission Shipment
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Shipment Commission Attempt
      ShipmentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: Shipment Confirmed
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Shipment Confirmed

      SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: Order Completed
      OrderService-->>Customer: Order Confirmed
      OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: Terminate Saga Orchestrator

    else Payment Failed
      PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: Payment Failed
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Payment Failed (Compensating)

      SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: Cancel Reservation
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Reservation Cancellation Attempt
      WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: Reservation Cancelled
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Reservation Cancelled

      SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: Order Failed (Payment)
      OrderService-->>Customer: Order Failed
      OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: Terminate Saga Orchestrator
    end

  else Items Not Available
    WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: Items Not Available
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: Log Items Not Available (Aborting)
    SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: Order Aborted (Items Unavailable)
    OrderService-->>Customer: Order Failed
    OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: Terminate Saga Orchestrator
  end

    BrakingAssistant -> ControlUnit : initiateBrakingManeuver()

    BrakingAssistant -> DiagnosticLog : logObservedRisk(ttc)
end

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "BicycleModel") {
    val frame = partDef(name = "Frame")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "Braking System")
    val crank = partDef(name = "Crank")
    val chain = partDef(name = "Chain")
    val rearWheel = partDef(name = "Rear Wheel")
    val handlebars = partDef(name = "Handlebars")
    val frontWheel = partDef(name = "Front Wheel")

    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "crank", typeId = crank.id)
        part(name = "chain", typeId = chain.id)
        part(name = "rearWheel", typeId = rearWheel.id)
    }

    val steeringAssembly = partDef(name = "Steering Assembly") {
        part(name = "handlebars", typeId = handlebars.id)
        part(name = "frontWheel", typeId = frontWheel.id)
    }

    val bicycleSystem = partDef(name = "Bicycle System") {
        part(name = "frame", typeId = frame.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "steeringAssembly", typeId = steeringAssembly.id)
        part(name = "brakingSystem", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Bicycle System BDD") {
        include(bicycleSystem)
        include(frame)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(steeringAssembly)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(crank)
        include(chain)
        include(rearWheel)
        include(handlebars)
        include(frontWheel)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AUTOSAR ECU Model") {
    // Declare atomic parts or abstract base types first, as they don't depend on others for their definition
    val cpuCore = partDef(name = "CPU Core")
    val ram = partDef(name = "RAM")
    val flashMemory = partDef(name = "Flash Memory")
    val softwareComponent = partDef(name = "Software Component")
    val virtualFunctionalBus = partDef(name = "Virtual Functional Bus")

    val communicationController = partDef(name = "Communication Controller", isAbstract = true)
    val bswModule = partDef(name = "BSW Module", isAbstract = true)

    // Declare parts that specialize base types, using 'specializes' as a parameter to partDef.
    val canController = partDef(name = "CAN Controller", specializes = communicationController.id)
    val linController = partDef(name = "LIN Controller", specializes = communicationController.id)
    val ethernetController = partDef(name = "Ethernet Controller", specializes = communicationController.id)

    val mcal = partDef(name = "MCAL", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val canCommunicationStack = partDef(name = "CAN Communication Stack", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val ethernetCommunicationStack = partDef(name = "Ethernet Communication Stack", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val os = partDef(name = "OS", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val watchdog = partDef(name = "Watchdog", specializes = bswModule.id)

    // Declare composed parts. Their definitions depend on the IDs of their constituent parts.
    val microcontroller = partDef(name = "Microcontroller") {
        part(name = "cpu", typeId = cpuCore.id)
        part(name = "ram_mem", typeId = ram.id)
        part(name = "flash_mem", typeId = flashMemory.id)
        part(name = "can_ctrl", typeId = canController.id)
        part(name = "lin_ctrl", typeId = linController.id)
        part(name = "eth_ctrl", typeId = ethernetController.id)
    }

    val autosarBswLayer = partDef(name = "AUTOSAR BSW Layer") {
        part(name = "mcal_drivers", typeId = mcal.id)
        part(name = "can_stack", typeId = canCommunicationStack.id)
        part(name = "eth_stack", typeId = ethernetCommunicationStack.id)
        part(name = "os_service", typeId = os.id)
        part(name = "wdg_service", typeId = watchdog.id)
    }

    val applicationLayer = partDef(name = "Application Layer") {
        part(name = "swc_1", typeId = softwareComponent.id)
        part(name = "swc_2", typeId = softwareComponent.id) // Example of multiple software components
        part(name = "vfb", typeId = virtualFunctionalBus.id)
    }

    // Declare the top-level ECU part, which composes the main layers.
    val ecu = partDef(name = "ECU") {
        part(name = "hardware_layer", typeId = microcontroller.id)
        part(name = "bsw_layer", typeId = autosarBswLayer.id)
        part(name = "application_layer", typeId = applicationLayer.id)
    }

    // Define the Block Definition Diagram to render all defined partDefs.
    bdd(name = "AUTOSAR ECU BDD") {
        include(ecu)
        include(microcontroller)
        include(cpuCore)
        include(ram)
        include(flashMemory)
        include(canController)
        include(linController)
        include(ethernetController)
        include(communicationController)
        include(autosarBswLayer)
        include(mcal)
        include(canCommunicationStack)
        include(ethernetCommunicationStack)
        include(os)
        include(watchdog)
        include(bswModule)
        include(applicationLayer)
        include(softwareComponent)
        include(virtualFunctionalBus)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "Earth Observation Satellite System") {
    // (1) Payload subsystem components
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument", isAbstract = true)
    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera")
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar")

    // (2) Structure and thermal control components
    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")

    // (3) Electrical power supply components
    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val powerDistributionUnitPDU = partDef(name = "Power Distribution Unit (PDU)")

    // (4) Attitude and Orbit Control System — AOCS — components
    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    // (5) Telemetry, Tracking & Command (TT&C) components
    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    // Define subsystems as partDefs containing their components
    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "opticalCamera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "sarRadar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }

    val structureAndThermalControlSubsystem = partDef(name = "Structure & Thermal Control Subsystem") {
        part(name = "primaryStructure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "solarPanels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "heatShield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }

    val electricalPowerSupplySubsystem = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply Subsystem") {
        part(name = "batteryArray", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "solarPowerRegulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = powerDistributionUnitPDU.id)
    }

    val aocsSubsystem = partDef(name = "Attitude & Orbit Control System (AOCS)") {
        part(name = "starSensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "reactionWheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }

    val ttcSubsystem = partDef(name = "Telemetry, Tracking & Command (TT&C) Subsystem") {
        part(name = "onBoardComputer", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "rfTransmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rfReceiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    // Define the top-level satellite system
    val earthObservationSatellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payloadSubsystem", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structureThermalControl", typeId = structureAndThermalControlSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "electricalPowerSupply", typeId = electricalPowerSupplySubsystem.id)
        part(name = "aocs", typeId = aocsSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "ttc", typeId = ttcSubsystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite System BDD") {
        include(earthObservationSatellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(structureAndThermalControlSubsystem)
        include(electricalPowerSupplySubsystem)
        include(aocsSubsystem)
        include(ttcSubsystem)

        include(payloadInstrument) // Still included as a general abstract block
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)

        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)

        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(powerDistributionUnitPDU)

        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)

        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}
